title: Fix false ASSIGNIN on interface input port connections

features.name: interface with input wire port
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration with an input wire port

features.name: port connection to interface input port
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with port connection to an interface input port via instance name

features.name: output port drive via interface input
features.description: Code should include an output port being driven through a connection to an interface input port on an interface instance
